title: phyla nodiflora var. reptans
intro: Phyla nodiflora var. reptans, also known as marsh fleabane or creeping phyla, is a perennial herb in the Lamiaceae family. It is commonly found in wet environments and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues. Phyla nodiflora var. reptans can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
